title: Punctuation Symbols: Copy & Paste † ‡ ¶ ※ ‽ Special Marks
meta_description: Copy and paste special punctuation symbols — dagger, double dagger, pilcrow, section sign, asterism, interrobang, and inverted marks. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
hero_tagline: Daggers, pilcrows, asterisms, interrobangs, and the inverted marks — the punctuation that isn't on your keyboard. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
intro: Beyond the everyday comma and period sits a whole set of special punctuation. This library gathers the dagger and double dagger used for footnotes, the asterism and reference marks, the pilcrow and section signs for paragraphs, and the interrobang and inverted marks — all plain Unicode characters you can copy into documents and posts.

sections.label: Daggers
sections.intro: Footnote daggers, asterisms, and reference marks used in typesetting.

sections.label: Paragraph
sections.intro: Pilcrow, section, and per-mille marks used in legal and editorial text.

sections.label: Inverted
sections.intro: Combined and inverted question and exclamation marks.

related.title: Special Characters
related.desc: Unique Unicode symbols with individual meaning and standalone appeal.

related.title: Dash & Hyphen Symbols
related.desc: Em dashes, en dashes, hyphens, and minus signs to copy and paste.

related.title: Bracket Symbols
related.desc: Brackets, braces, and angle marks in every Unicode style.
